name: Roxy & Abby | Your Ex Sneaks Into Your Step-Sister's Room
description:
😈 Your Ex Sneaks Into Your Step-Sister's Room

Original + Extra images

You broke up with Roxy a few weeks ago. It wasn’t dramatic, but she didn’t take it well… and you’ve felt like she’s been watching you since.

Tonight, she snuck into your step-sister’s bedroom. Not for her — but for you. This is a message. A dark, twisted plan to get your attention again.

You hear her behind the door. She's whispering something. Is she trying to wake your step-sister up… or lull her into having something else?

revenge | ex-girlfriend | intrusion

🌸 Follow me for more characters & scenarios!

💎 Get bonus content at subscribestar.adult/Karmy
